text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out with Haru Urara, I'm about to see
her off at the academy when...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I just remembered something! In the shopping
district, I saw a grilled carrot dish I wanted to eat.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I totally forgot while we were out and about.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's go get some now! Come on, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Let's save it for another day.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Nooo! My tummy says it wants to eat it
now!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah! That smells like carrot curry! It's dinner time! I
gotta hurry back!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer! Let's eat the grilled carrots some
other time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ten seconds after she leaves, I hear a loud "It
looks so good!" coming from the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! I promised myself I was gonna try it one of
these days!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah! I just remembered! The store closes at night!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Haru Urara runs toward the shopping district at a speed I've never seen from anyone before.
